title: The Conservatory After Midnight
originalityStatement: An original benchmark about a botanist and a climate-controlled conservatory, created without copying a source game.

storyModel.premise: A junior botanist must prove why one sealed greenhouse changes its pathways when the irrigation pressure shifts.
storyModel.playerRole: Junior botanist on the final night shift
protectedCanon: The pressure anomaly is revealed only after the player observes two plant responses

productProfile.spatialBudget: four rooms with two irrigation states
